name: Saladas+
tail: Missing explicit signal. mostly_vegan needs language like "all mains are vegan", "fully vegan except for X", or "95% of the menu is vegan". /   Reminder: "plant-based", "plant-forward", or "vegetarian" alone usually = vegan_friendly, not mostly_vegan. /   Pass --force-vegan-level to override this guard, otherwise downgrade to vegan_friendly. /  /
